name: Windows Event Log Errors
description: Zeigt die letzten Fehler aus dem Windows-System-Eventlog an.

commands.cmd: powershell "Get-WinEvent -LogName System -MaxEvents 25 | Where-Object {$_.LevelDisplayName -eq 'Error'} | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, ProviderName, Message"
commands.powershell: Get-WinEvent -LogName System -MaxEvents 25 | Where-Object {$_.LevelDisplayName -eq 'Error'} | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, ProviderName, Message
